svg.title: Mini CRM Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Clean vertical architecture: Frontend, CRM Server, AI Agent, Database, and Channel Service connected by labeled arrows in three distinct flows.

g.text: Next.js 14 · Supabase · OpenAI/Gemini Tool Calling · Express.js Channel Service
AI never touches DB — server owns all SQL
Receives prompt + strict JSON Schema Tools
Returns function call JSON · no DB access

svg.text: Flow 1 · AI function calling (JSON Schema → parse → SQL)
